allow: Bash(ssh dibu7@192.168.0.105 "powershell -Command ''Get-ChildItem -Path D:, C:\\Users\\dibu7\\Desktop, C:\\Users\\dibu7\\Documents -Filter Tust-AETE -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 FullName''")
Bash(ssh dibu7@192.168.0.105 "dir D:\\ && echo --- && dir C:\\Users\\dibu7\\Desktop")

Bash(ssh dibu7@192.168.0.105 powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path C:\\Users\\dibu7\\Desktop, C:\\Users\\dibu7\\Documents, C:\\Users\\dibu7\\Downloads -Directory -Filter ''*AETE*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue 2>&1")
Bash(ssh dibu7@192.168.0.105 powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path C:\\Users\\dibu7 -Directory | Where-Object {$_Name -match ''Work|Tust|git''} | Select-Object Name, FullName")
